title: Stable Diffusion WebUI Cheat Sheet
description: A practical guide for engineers using Stable Diffusion WebUI for image generation.

commands.description: Enables streaming mode with the gpt-4o model for real-time outputs.
commands.scenario: When you need real-time image generation updates in a web application.

commands.description: Sets the randomness of the output, lower values make it more deterministic.
commands.scenario: When generating images that need to follow a strict style guide.

commands.command: "Think step by step. Then verify your answer."
commands.description: Encourages the model to generate more detailed and accurate images.
commands.scenario: When creating complex scenes that require multiple elements to be coherent.

commands.description: Sets the maximum resolution for generated images.
commands.scenario: When high-resolution outputs are required for print media.

commands.description: Instructs the model to generate images with vivid colors.
commands.scenario: When designing eye-catching graphics for marketing materials.

commands.description: Generates multiple images in a single batch to save time.
commands.scenario: When needing to quickly prototype several design options.

commands.description: Guides the model to create aesthetically balanced images.
commands.scenario: When producing images for architectural visualizations.

commands.description: Forces the use of CPU instead of GPU for image generation.
commands.scenario: When running on hardware without a compatible GPU.

commands.description: Prompts the model to create images of futuristic urban environments.
commands.scenario: When designing concept art for sci-fi projects.

commands.description: Sets a fixed seed for reproducible image generation results.
commands.scenario: When you need to ensure consistent outputs across different runs.

commands.description: Instructs the model to include natural elements in the image.
commands.scenario: When creating designs that need to blend with natural environments.

commands.description: Optimizes memory usage during image generation.
commands.scenario: When working on systems with limited RAM resources.

commands.description: Prompts the model to generate simple and clean images.
commands.scenario: When designing logos or UI elements that require minimalism.

commands.description: Enables the HTTP API server, allowing external scripts and applications to interact with the WebUI via JSON requests.
Enables memory-efficient attention mechanisms to significantly increase generation speed and reduce VRAM usage.
Prompt engineering syntax to adjust the importance of a specific token (e.g., '(cyberpunk:1.2)' increases emphasis).
Allows the WebUI to be accessible from other devices on the local network by binding to all network interfaces.
Forces the use of FP32 for the VAE to prevent 'black image' errors caused by precision loss in half-precision mode.
